PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-27-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, SABAS RODRIGUEZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2012 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAR-19-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SPANISH INTERPRETER REQUESTED FOR THE DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER AVELINA PRITCHARD PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.
